title: Trace and Royalty Record
description: A schema for representing origin traceability, transformation history, attribution routing, value circulation, and governance review in Civilizational OS.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for the trace and royalty record.

recorded_at.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

recorded_by.description: Identifier of the human, AI engine, agent, or governance module that created the record.

origin.description: Human-origin source of the idea, question, design, judgment, or creative act.

origin_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the origin was created or recorded.

origin_reference.description: Optional reference to the original document, prompt, note, repository issue, commit, or external source.

transformation.description: How the origin was transformed by AI, agents, humans, or governance modules.

engine_id.description: Identifier of the AI engine, agent, or system that performed the transformation.

input_reference.description: Reference to the input trace, record, document, or artifact.

output_reference.description: Reference to the generated, transformed, or derivative output.

communication.description: Communication route through which the transformed output was transmitted or reused.

communication_scope.description: Scope of the communication or reuse.

communication_reference.description: Optional reference to the communication event, message, thread, API call, commit, or artifact.

contributors.description: List of contributors involved in the origin, transformation, review, or circulation.

contribution_summary.description: Optional summary of the contributor's role.

attribution_route.description: Ordered route of origin, transformation, derivative, or reuse references.

derivative_links.description: Optional derivative relationships connected to this record.

derivative_id.description: Identifier of the derivative output or record.

relation.description: Relationship between the derivative and the source.

royalty.description: Value circulation, return route, and review requirements.

value_flow_type.description: Type of value circulation or return mechanism.

return_route.description: Identifier of the human, contributor, route, or system to which value should return.

review_required.description: Whether human or governance review is required before circulation.

royalty_notes.description: Optional notes about attribution, return, recognition, or economic flow.

governance.description: Governance status, validation status, boundary flags, and recovery requirements.

validation_status.description: Validation status of the trace and royalty record.

boundary_flags.description: Boundary or risk flags detected in the trace and royalty route.

recovery_required.description: Whether recovery or re-anchoring is required.

related_records.description: Optional references to related equilibrium, validation, cooling, governance, or review records.
